scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: start "CMS Backend" cmd /k "cd backend && npm run dev" && start "CMS Frontend" cmd /k "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: start "CMS Backend" cmd /k "cd backend && npm start" && start "CMS Frontend" cmd /k "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.export: npm run build --prefix frontend && node export-pages.js
scripts.deploy: npm run build --prefix frontend && node export-pages.js && firebase deploy --only hosting
